hero.title: 一条视频，
hero.subtitle: 粘贴链接或上传文件 — AI 自动转写并将内容改写成博客文章、社交媒体帖子、邮件通讯等多种格式。
hero.placeholder: 粘贴 YouTube、播客或任何视频链接...

steps.title: 粘贴或上传
steps.desc: 粘贴 YouTube 链接、上传音频文件、或直接粘贴文本。无需任何配置。

steps.title: AI 智能转化
steps.desc: AI 理解你的内容，并针对每个平台的独特风格进行智能改写。

steps.title: 全平台发布
steps.desc: 获得公众号文章、Twitter 线程、LinkedIn 帖子、小红书笔记等 — 一键复制、下载。

features.label: 功能特性
features.title: 扩展内容的
features.subtitle: 为希望最大化每一条内容价值的创作者打造。

list.title: AI 智能改写
list.desc: Not just transcription — our AI understands context and rewrites for each platform's unique voice and format.

list.title: 10 种输出格式
list.desc: Blog posts, Twitter threads, LinkedIn posts, Xiaohongshu notes, newsletters, SRT subtitles, SEO articles, and more.

list.title: 63+ 种语言
list.desc: Transcribe and generate content in 63+ languages. Perfect for international creators and global audiences.

list.title: 流式生成
list.desc: See content appear character by character in real-time. No more waiting for loading spinners.

list.title: 对话式精调
list.desc: Chat with each output to fine-tune it. Say "make it shorter" or "add emoji" — AI applies it instantly.

list.title: 6 种导出格式
list.desc: Download as Markdown, TXT, PDF, DOCX, SRT, or CSV. Directly ready for publishing.

list.title: 分享与协作
list.desc: Generate shareable links for your teammates to view and collaborate on content.

list.title: 隐私安全
list.desc: Your content stays yours. Files are automatically deleted after processing. No data retention.

list.title: 智能检测
list.desc: Paste a YouTube link? We suggest blog + Twitter. Paste Bilibili? We suggest WeChat + Xiaohongshu.

formats.outputSubtitle: 同时生成所有格式 — 无需多次运行。
formats.langSubtitle: 转写和生成 63+ 种语言的内容。适合国际创作者和全球受众。

testimonials.text: "Finally a tool that understands content creation workflow. One video → all platforms in minutes. Game changer for my content schedule."
testimonials.author: Sarah Chen

testimonials.text: "The conversational refinement is brilliant. I can tweak each output by just chatting with it. Saves me hours every week."
testimonials.author: Marcus Rivera

testimonials.text: "I was skeptical about AI content, but the quality genuinely surprised me. The platform-specific formatting is spot on."
testimonials.author: Yuki Tanaka

testimonials.text: "As a solo founder, this tool gives me a content team's output. LinkedIn posts, blogs, tweets — all from one video."
testimonials.author: Alex Park

pricing.label: 定价
pricing.title: 简单
pricing.subtitle: 免费开始，需要更多时再升级。无隐藏费用。

cta.title: 准备好
cta.subtitle: 加入数千名创作者，将每一条视频变成完整的多平台内容矩阵。免费开始。

footer.tagline: AI 驱动的内容复用。将一条视频变成你的整个多平台内容策略。
footer.builtWith: 为全球内容创作者打造
